events.title: Q2 2026 Business Review
events.description: Q2 2026 Business Review on Wednesday, April 15, 2026, from 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM at Executive Conference Room (HQ, 10th Floor). Agenda: 9:00 AM - CEO Opening Remarks; 9:15 AM - Financial Review (CFO); 9:45 AM - Sales & Revenue Update; 10:15 AM - Break; 10:30 AM - Product Roadmap; 11:00 AM - Operations Update; 11:30 AM - Strategic Initiatives; 12:00 PM - Closing & Next Steps. Presentation materials due April 8, 2026. This is a recurring quarterly meeting with future dates: July 15, October 14, January 13.

events.title: Presentation Materials Due
events.description: Presentation materials due date for Q2 2026 Business Review. Submit to ops@company.com by April 8, 2026. This is a deadline for event preparation.

confidence.description: Confidence score from 0.0 to 1.0 indicating extraction certainty

importance.description: Event importance: 'action_required' for closures, schedule changes, deadlines the user must act on; 'fyi' for themed days, birthdays, informational items that are nice to know
importance.title: Importance
